notes: Provider-catalog → site-profile queue. Every entry defaults to status="pending-terms-review" so autodev/CI cannot start a live capture without explicit operator action.
Queue entries cite the catalog providerId and the matching site-profile id (see config/capture-sites.example.json).
captureAuthorizedAt and authorizedBy are intentionally null — they MUST be filled in by an authorized operator using a separate local file (not this committed example) before a live capture run.

entries.rationale: Highest-priority paid commercial provider; capture only after terms and BYOK fallback decisions are documented.
Backup BYOK provider; UI capture is a fallback only after subscription/terms review.
Free-trial/credit-based provider; prefer BYOK REST API once trial limits are confirmed.
Commercial maritime intelligence; capture requires operator-confirmed contract.
Discovery-only candidate; UI capture is a placeholder while adapter is in design.
Discovery-only candidate; capture pending subscription and terms review.
Discovery-only candidate; capture pending BYOK coverage decision.
Acceptable-use policy unverified; do not enable live capture until operator confirms.
